name: io.github.codespar/mcp-rede
description: MCP server for Rede — Itaú-owned Brazilian card acquirer. Authorize/capture/refund, zero-auth, card tokens, and native recurrences.

environmentVariables.name: REDE_PV
environmentVariables.description: Rede merchant filiação (PV) — numeric merchant identifier issued with your commercial contract.

environmentVariables.name: REDE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Rede API security token paired with PV. Used in HTTP Basic auth as the password.
